response.justification: The candidate is a versatile senior full-stack engineer with roughly 15+ years of experience and some genuine high-scale exposure (low-latency microservices handling millions of requests per second at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic), but the profile does not match a Principal IC6 growth/experimentation role. There is no evidence of building experimentation platforms, feature-flagging systems, telemetry/metrics infrastructure, or statistical analysis workflows, and no demonstrated multi-workstream technical leadership at the scope this level demands. Recent roles are product-focused senior/staff positions at small companies rather than platform-level leadership enabling multiple teams.
strengths: Strong breadth across web, mobile, embedded, and backend with solid engineering craft (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
Real high-scale distributed systems experience with low-latency services at millions of requests per second
Recent hands-on AI tooling work (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks) matching the AI-first emphasis
concerns: No experimentation, A/B testing, feature-flighting, or growth measurement platform experience — the core of the role
No demonstrated principal-level scope: no cross-team platform ownership, architecture leadership, or mentoring at organizational scale
Limited evidence of data/statistics aptitude for metrics design, bias detection, and experimental analysis

key_factors.factor: Scope gap vs Principal IC6 expectations
Solid engineering fundamentals with some at-scale systems work
